title: Branches, Integration, and Merge Evidence · Repository Checkpoint
summary: Integrate a short-lived change while preserving understandable topology and verifying both file content and combined behavior. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a branch-and-merge topology lab. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create, list, rename, copy, delete, and inspect branches as movable references with upstream metadata.
Switch branches only after predicting working-tree/index carryover, untracked collisions, and sparse or worktree constraints.
Find merge bases and explain three-way integration from two tips and their best common ancestor.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# git-basics cumulative repository evidence notebook
# Git operations change only disposable simulated repository state.
# Inspect status, diffs, graph, refs, and recovery before every mutation.

steps.title: Branch Reference · changed case
steps.instruction:
quiz case — Branches main and repair diverge from merge base b00b1e5. repair changes validation while main changes output formatting; predict fast-forward possibility, resulting parents, and post-merge behavior evidence.

Which action demonstrates Branch Reference without dropping earlier contracts?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for create, list, rename, copy, delete, and inspect branches as movable references with upstream metadata.

content.text: Branches main and repair diverge from merge base b00b1e5. repair changes validation while main changes output formatting; predict fast-forward possibility, resulting parents, and post-merge behavior evidence.

content.text: Use the supplied trace to distinguish an observed Branch Reference result from an unsupported claim.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: Git Reference — Controls porcelain and plumbing command behavior, configuration, revision syntax, hooks, workflows, and recovery.

Trace this concrete case before choosing: Branches main and repair diverge from merge base b00b1e5. repair changes validation while main changes output formatting; predict fast-forward possibility, resulting parents, and post-merge behavior evidence.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: A branch contains a private copy of every project file.

options.text: Create, list, rename, copy, delete, and inspect branches as movable references with upstream metadata. Apply it to the stated input and retain a reproducible trace for a branch-and-merge topology lab.

Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process
steps.instruction: Order the Branch Reference evidence cycle for this quiz task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Branch Reference assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

Preview and perform the least destructive simulated Git operation
Verify status, staged and range diffs, graph, tests, remote target, and recovery path

steps.title: Diagnose the hidden failure
steps.instruction:
quiz case — Branches main and repair diverge from merge base b00b1e5. repair changes validation while main changes output formatting; predict fast-forward possibility, resulting parents, and post-merge behavior evidence.

The visible result looks correct, but its invariant or value contract is unverified. What must happen next?

stimulus.title: Post Merge Verification failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: required

options.text: Run the boundary case, inspect the actual mechanism, then accept or repair the claim.
Accept the result because visible output is the highest authority.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision
steps.instruction: Write the quiz evidence note for Post Merge Verification: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Branches main and repair diverge from merge base b00b1e5. repair changes validation while main changes output formatting; predict fast-forward possibility, resulting parents, and post-merge behavior evidence.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Verify merged tree, combined tests, log topology, diff range, and push target before publishing integration.
